general.prompt: What's the hot new political drama in the Philippines?
options: A massive funeral procession for Ayatollah Khamenei in Tehran
Sky's takeover of ITV reshaping British television
The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte
A $20 million Taylor Swift wedding at Madison Square Garden
general.summary: The Philippine Senate has started the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte amid her feud with President Marcos Jr.

general.prompt: What's drawing a massive crowd in Tehran?
options: The funeral procession for Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
general.summary: Mourners flooded Tehran for the funeral procession of the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

general.prompt: What's Taylor Swift reportedly spending $20 million on?
options: A wedding at Madison Square Garden
A political campaign in the Philippines
general.summary: Taylor Swift's MSG wedding signals a change in how money and independence reshape marriage for a generation of women.

general.prompt: Which company is taking over ITV in a $2.1 billion deal?
general.summary: Sky has sealed a deal to acquire ITV's television network operations, putting it in charge of hit series including 'Love Island.'

options: Defense spending pledges facing the Trump test
The third day of Khamenei's funeral
A new reality show on ITV
general.summary: Leaders focus on whether Europe can turn higher defense spending into military power as Washington pushes allies to shoulder more burden.

tech.prompt: Which Nintendo game made its first appearance on Famitsu's most wanted list this week, and is it already plotting world domination?
options: The Legend of Zelda: Hyrule Warriors 2
tech.summary: Xenoblade Genesis appeared for the first time on Famitsu's most wanted games chart for July 2026.

tech.prompt: A former Apple and Amazon engineer started an AI chip company in his mid-50s. What decade of retirement did he sacrifice for this?
tech.summary: A former Apple and Amazon engineer, in his mid-50s, founded an AI chip company after decades in Silicon Valley.

tech.prompt: Samsung's Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra reportedly revives the S Pen. But what's the catch?
options: The S Pen is now made of cheese
tech.summary: The rumored Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra brings back the S Pen, but with a catch mentioned in the spec sheet.

tech.prompt: To make the perfect grilled cheese, which two cheese slices does The Takeout suggest you use?
tech.summary: For a better grilled cheese, The Takeout recommends a combination of gouda and Havarti cheese.

tech.prompt: According to Daily Kos, what are two factors blamed for video games becoming a fortune?
tech.summary: The Daily Kos article blames Trump and AI for spiking console prices and inflation in video games.

business.prompt: It's a quiet week, but the market's still got moves! What's the main event investors are prepping for?
options: A government announcement on free pizza for all traders
A lunar eclipse that's supposed to boost stock prices
Nvidia's next-gen AI rack system launch
business.summary: A quiet calendar gives the market space to go off the beaten path as investors gear up for earnings season.

business.prompt: Sky's buying ITV in a mega deal that's shaking up British telly. What hit show is now under Sky's wing?
business.summary: Sky has sealed a deal to acquire ITV's television network operations, putting it in charge of hit series including 'Love Island'.

business.prompt: A humanoid robot company is going public, but don't expect a robot butler at your door just yet. What's the company's name?
business.summary: Agility Robotics is betting its future on execution and a SPAC, while its CEO isn't promising a robot in your home anytime soon.

business.prompt: Meta's got a headache in India over Instagram ads. What's the government angry about?
business.summary: Meta faces regulatory scrutiny in India over child abuse ads on Instagram, drawing government ire.

business.prompt: Nvidia's next-gen AI rack system hit a snag. When is it now expected to launch?
business.summary: Nvidia's next-gen AI rack system is delayed to 2028 due to manufacturing snags, per SemiAnalysis.

sports.prompt: Mexico faced England at the Estadio Azteca with a man advantage for most of the second half. How did they lose?
sports.summary: Mexico lost 3-2 to England in the World Cup at Estadio Azteca despite playing with a man advantage for most of the second half.

sports.prompt: Who intervened to lift US striker Balogun's red card suspension before a World Cup match?
sports.summary: President Donald Trump intervened on behalf of US striker Folarin Balogun, leading FIFA to lift his red card suspension for a World Cup match against Belgium.

sports.prompt: How many FedExCup points did Chris Gotterup earn for winning the John Deere Classic?
sports.summary: Chris Gotterup won the John Deere Classic, earning 500 FedExCup points and $1.58 million.

sports.prompt: Where was the NASCAR Cup Series race held during the eero 400?
sports.summary: The NASCAR Cup Series eero 400 was held at Chicagoland Speedway.

sports.prompt: Erling Haaland scored twice to lead Norway to a 2-1 win over which team?
sports.summary: Erling Haaland scored two goals as Norway defeated five-time champion Brazil 2-1 to advance to the World Cup quarterfinals for the first time.

science.prompt: What's the secret behind Montblanc's new rugged watch? Did we actually scratch it?
options: It will take pics for the next decade
science.summary: The Montblanc Iced Sea Automatic Date 0 Oxygen comes out of the box looking rugged and tough, and the writer didn't scratch it.

science.prompt: Mars once had a magnetic field like Earth's. What happened when it collapsed?
options: Mars lost its atmosphere and oceans
Aliens built a giant digital camera
science.summary: When Mars' magnetic field faded, the planet lost its thick atmosphere and surface water, transforming from a potentially life-hosting world into a frozen desert.

science.prompt: What's the latest news about Thwaites Glacier? Is it good?
options: Scientists discovered a new defense against solar storms
Thwaites is now a watch brand
science.summary: Three videos since June 2026 discuss news and explanations about Thwaites Glacier, and the news is not good.

science.prompt: How can scientists protect Earth from solar storms? New defense method?
options: They discovered a new method to reduce severity
By taking selfies with the biggest digital camera
science.summary: A recent study offers a way to reduce the severity of geomagnetic storms caused by solar activity.

science.prompt: What's the biggest digital camera ever going to do?
options: Take pics for the next decade
science.summary: The Vera C. Rubin Observatory in Chile will shoot hundreds of images daily for the next decade.
